extraction_notes: Extracted three business segments with distinct customer types and channel structures, seven top-level offering families with full parent-child hierarchies (Acrobat, Creative Cloud, Firefly, Experience Platform, GenStudio, Express, Stock), and revenue models. Firefly spans both Digital Media and Digital Experience segments. Offering-level channels included only where differentiated from segment defaults. Worldwide geography scope. No specific named partners identified in memo.
